name: foundry-framework-monorepo
description: create-foundry-app: ship developer apps to the FoundryDB platform

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/runtime && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli && npm run build --workspace=packages/create-foundry-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/runtime && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/create-foundry-app
